usage: unsetPinConstraint [-help] [[-global | -cell <cell_name> | -all_user ] [-global | -pin <pin_name_list> | -area {x1 y1 x2 y2} | -all_area | -side <side_names>] [-global | -layer ] [-global | -loc | -edge | -corner <corner_number>] [[-pin <pin_name_list> [-loc ] [-edge ]] | [-corner_to_pin_distance [-corner <corner_number>]]] [{-pin <pin_name_list> | -pinTemplate {layer_id_or_name_list}} -width ] [{-pin <pin_name_list> | -pinTemplate {layer_id_or_name_list}} -depth ] [-layer | -pinTemplate {layer_id_or_name_list}] [-spacing [-area {x1 y1 x2 y2}] [-all_area ]] ] [-depth [-special_wire ]] [-all_user ]

options.name: -all_area
options.description: Specifies that spacing constraints on all area should be removed.

options.name: -all_user
options.description: Specifies that all user constraints should be removed.

options.name: -area
options.description: Specifies an area overlapping with partition where spacing constraint should be removed.

options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the cell of partition or top. You can use wildcards with this parameter.

options.name: -corner
options.description: Specifies the corner of the partition block.

options.name: -corner_to_pin_distance
options.description: Specifies that the corner to pin distance constraints should be removed.

options.name: -depth
options.description: Specifies that the pin depth related constraints should be removed.

options.name: -edge
options.description: Specifies that the edge-related constraints should be removed.

options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies that the layer-related constraints should be removed.

options.name: -loc
options.description: Specifies that the location-related constraints should be removed.

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of the partition pin. You can use wildcards with this parameter.

options.name: -pinTemplate
options.description: Specifies the metal layers for the width, depth and spacing constraints at global level and cell level.

options.name: -side
options.description: Specifies name of the sides. Valid values are { N S E W } or { L B T R } or all

options.name: -spacing
options.description: Specifies that the spacing-related constraints should be removed.

options.name: -special_wire
options.description: Specifies that the depth constraint that is set and honored for special wire pins should be removed

options.name: -width
options.description: Specifies that the pin width related constraints should be removed.
